debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G✝ H C : Graph α β
S X Y : Set α
M M' : Set β
u v x y z : α
e f : β
P P' : WList α β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β
⊢ ∀ ⦃I B : Set α⦄,
    (∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ I ⊆ V(G, M)) →
      ¬Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) I →
        Maximal (fun S => ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M)) B →
          ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, @Graph.IsMatching α β G M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M)

intro I B hI hNI hB

      have hy : hP.toWList.last ∉ V(G, MI) := hP.last_not_in
      have hxy : {hP.toWList.first, hP.toWList.last} ⊆ V(G, MI') := by

intro I B hI hNI hB
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hIs⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hBs⟩ := hB.1
    have hB_v : B = V(G, MB) := hB.2 ⟨MB, hMB, subset_rfl⟩ hBs
    by_contra! h_all
    have h_max : MI.encard < MB.encard := by
      contrapose! hNI
      refine ⟨⟨MI, hMI, hIs⟩, fun J hJ hIJ ↦ ?_⟩
      obtain ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJs⟩ := hJ
      refine hIJ.antisymm ?_
      intro x hxJ
      by_contra hxI
      exact h_all x ⟨hB_v.symm ▸ hBs hxJ, hxI⟩ MJ hMJ (insert_subset hxJ hIJ |>.trans hJs)
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hMI.exists_isAugPath_not_max (fun h_m ↦ h_max.not_le (h_m.max MB hMB))
    have hMI' := hP.augment
    have hIs' := hP.augment_vertex_subset.trans (V_mono G (subset_symmDiff _ _))
    exact h_all P.first ⟨hB_v.symm ▸ hBs hP.first_not_in.elim, hP.first_not_in⟩ (MI ∆ E(P)) hMI' (insert_subset hP.first_not_in.elim hIs |>.trans hIs')

rintro I B ⟨M_I, hMI, hI⟩ hI_not_max hB_max
    obtain ⟨M_B, hMB, hB_sub⟩ := hB_max.1
    have hB_eq : B = V(G, M_B) := hB_max.2 ⟨M_B, hMB, subset_refl _⟩ hB_sub |>.symm
    obtain ⟨J, ⟨M_J, hMJ, hJ_sub⟩, hIJ, hIneJ⟩ := (not_maximal_iff _ _).1 hI_not_max
    have h_lt : I.encard < B.encard := by
      rw [hB_eq]
      have h_J_le_B : J.encard ≤ (V(G, M_B)).encard := by
        rw [← hB_eq]
        exact (hB_max.2 ⟨M_J, hMJ, hJ_sub⟩ hIJ.trans_le |>.le)
      exact (encard_lt_encard_iff_subset_nontrivial.mpr ⟨hIJ, hIneJ⟩).trans_le h_J_le_B
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ : (B \ I).Nonempty := by
      rw [diff_nonempty_iff_not_subset]
      intro h_sub
      exact h_lt.not_le (encard_le_encard h_sub)
    refine ⟨x, hx, ?_⟩
    have h_v_B : ∀ x ∈ B, ∃ e ∈ M_B, x ∈ V(G, e) := by
      intro x hx; rw [hB_eq] at hx; exact hx
    obtain ⟨e, he, hxe⟩ := h_v_B x hx.1
    use M_B
    exact ⟨hMB, insert_subset hxe (hB_eq ▸ hx.1 |>.subset_refl.trans (by rw [← hB_eq]; exact hB_sub))⟩

intro I B hI hNI hB
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hIMI⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hBMB⟩ := hB.1
    have hB_eq : B = V(G, MB) := hB.2 ⟨MB, hMB, subset_rfl⟩ hBMB
    have hMB_max : G.IsMaxMatching MB := ⟨hMB, fun M' hM' ↦ by
      have hVM' : ∃ M'', G.IsMatching M'' ∧ V(G, M') ⊆ V(G, M'') := ⟨M', hM', subset_rfl⟩
      rw [← hB_eq] at hBMB
      exact (encard_le_encard (hB.2 hVM' hBMB).subset).trans (V_subset_G_V M' |> encard_le_encard)⟩
    have hI_lt_B : I.encard < B.encard := by
      have hInM : ¬G.IsMaxMatching MI ∨ I ⊂ V(G, MI) := by
        contrapose! hNI
        exact ⟨MI, hNI.1, hNI.2.subset⟩
      cases hInM with
      | inl hnM =>
        rw [hB_eq, encard_V_eq_two_mul_encard_of_isMatching hMB, IsMaxMatching.encard hMB_max]
        have hI_le := (encard_le_encard hIMI).trans (encard_V_eq_two_mul_encard_of_isMatching hMI |> le_of_eq)
        have hMI_lt := hnM.isMatching.encard_le.lt_of_not_le (fun h ↦ hnM ⟨hMI, fun M' hM' ↦ h.trans (hM'.encard_le)⟩)
        exact hI_le.trans_lt (Order.mul_lt_mul_left' hMI_lt (by norm_num))
      | inr hss => exact (encard_le_encard hss.subset).lt_of_ne (fun h ↦ hss.ne (eq_of_subset_of_encard_le hss.subset h.le).symm) |>.trans_le (hB_eq ▸ le_refl _)
    obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxI⟩ := exists_of_ssubset (ssubset_of_encard_lt hI_lt_B)
    refine ⟨x, ⟨hxB, hxI⟩, ?_⟩
    obtain ⟨M, hM, hIM⟩ := hI
    by_cases hxM : x ∈ V(G, M)
    · exact ⟨M, hM, insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨hxM, hIM⟩⟩
    · obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := G.exists_isAugPath_not_max (fun h ↦ (hB_max.encard ▸ h.encard.symm ▸ hI_lt_B).not_le (hIM.trans (V_subset_G_V M) |> encard_le_encard |>.trans (encard_V_eq_two_mul_encard_of_isMatching hM |> le_of_eq)))
      exact ⟨M ∆ E(P), hP.augment, hIM.trans hP.augment_vertex_subset |> (insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨by sorry, ·⟩)⟩

intro I B hI hnm hB
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hI_sub⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hB_sub⟩ := hB.1
    have hB_v : V(G, MB) = B := hB.eq_of_ge ⟨MB, hMB, subset_rfl⟩ hB_sub
    obtain ⟨P, hP, hx⟩ := hMI.exists_augPath_to_basis hI_sub hnm hMB hB_v
    exact ⟨P.first, hx, MI ∆ E(P), hP.augment, hP.augment_vertex_subset.trans_rev (insert_subset_iff.mpr ⟨hP.first_mem_V_augment, hI_sub⟩)⟩

intro I B hI hnotI hB
    obtain ⟨MJ, hMJ, hJMJ⟩ := not_maximal_iff.mp hnotI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hBMB⟩ := hB.1
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hIMI⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxI⟩ : ∃ x ∈ B, x ∉ I := by
      by_contra! h; exact hnotI (hB.2 hI h |> (· ▸ hB))
    have h_alt : ∃ P, G.IsAugPath hMI P ∨ G.IsAltPath hMI P := by sorry
    have h_exists : ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M', G.IsMatching M' ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M') := by sorry
    exact h_exists

intro I B hI hInotMax hBMax
    obtain ⟨M_I, hM_I, hI_sub⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨M_B, hM_B, hB_sub⟩ := hBMax.1
    have hB_eq : B = V(G, M_B) := hBMax.2 ⟨M_B, hM_B, subset_refl _⟩ hB_sub
    have h_M_I_not_max : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching M_I := by
      intro h_max
      apply hInotMax
      refine ⟨⟨M_I, hM_I, hI_sub⟩, fun J hJ hIJ ↦ ?_⟩
      obtain ⟨M_J, hM_J, hJ_sub⟩ := hJ
      have hJ_enc : V(G, M_J).encard ≤ B.encard := by
        rw [hB_eq]
        exact (hBMax.2 ⟨M_J, hM_J, subset_refl _⟩ subset_refl).encard_le
      sorry
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hM_I.exists_isAugPath_not_max h_M_I_not_max
    sorry

intro I B hI hInm hB
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hI_MI⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hB_MB⟩ := hB.1
    have hMI_not_max : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching MI := by
      intro hmax
      have hB_le := hmax.max MB hMB
      have hI_encard := (encard_le_encard hI_MI).trans (IsMatching.degree_le_one hMI |>.encard_le_encard_V_G_M MI)
      sorry
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hMI.exists_isAugPath_not_max hMI_not_max
    sorry

rintro I B ⟨M_I, hM_I, hI_MI⟩ hnmI ⟨⟨M_B, hM_B, hB_MB⟩, hmaxB⟩
    have h_card : I.encard < B.encard := by
      by_contra! h_le
      apply hnmI
      refine ⟨⟨M_I, hM_I, hI_MI⟩, fun J hJ hIJ ↦ hIJ.antisymm ?_⟩
      obtain ⟨M_J, hM_J, hJ_MJ⟩ := hJ
      have hJ_enc : J.encard ≤ B.encard := by
        obtain ⟨M_B', hM_B', hB_MB'⟩ := hmaxB
        sorry
      sorry
    obtain ⟨x, hxB, hxI, M, hM, hMxI⟩ : ∃ x ∈ B \ I, ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ insert x I ⊆ V(G, M) := by
      let M_diff := M_I ∆ M_B
      sorry
    exact ⟨x, ⟨hxB, hxI⟩, M, hM, hMxI⟩

intro I B hI hNI hB
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hIMI⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hBMB⟩ := hB.1
    have hlt : MI.encard < MB.encard := by
      contrapose! hNI
      exact hB.isMaxMatching_of_vertex_subset hIMI
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hMI.exists_isAugPath_not_max (fun h ↦ hlt.not_le (h.max _ hMB))
    exact ⟨P.first, by sorry, MI ∆ E(P), hP.augment, by sorry⟩

intro I B hI hNI hB
    obtain ⟨MI, hMI, hIMI⟩ := hI
    obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hBMB⟩ := hB.1
    have hB_eq : B = V(G, MB) := hB.2 _ ⟨MB, hMB, rfl.subset⟩ hBMB |>.symm
    have hM_not_max : ¬ G.IsMaxMatching MI := fun h ↦
      hNI (hB.2 I hI (hB_eq.symm ▸ hIMI.trans (by rw [h.encard, hMI.encard_le]; sorry)))
    obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hMI.exists_isAugPath_not_max hM_not_max
    exact ⟨P.first, ⟨by sorry, by sorry⟩, MI ∆ E(P), hP.augment,
           insert_subset (by sorry) (hIMI.trans hP.augment_vertex_subset)⟩
